headline: 5 Insurance Stocks Poised to Outperform Q2 Earnings Expectations
summary: Solid retention, renewals, prudent pricing, exposure growth and improved digitization are expected to help CINF, RGA, OSCR, WTW and AFL outperform Q2 estimates.

headline: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Launches New Pension Tools And Expands Digital Insurance Reach
summary: Willis Towers Watson (NasdaqGS:WTW) has launched a new Deferred Pension Annuity application for insurers and pension risk transfer markets. The company has also released a next-generation Geospatial Mortality Model for the U.S. pension risk transfer market. WTW entered a new digital insurance partnership to embed compliance and coverage solutions for subcontractors into workforce management platforms. These product launches place Willis Towers Watson squarely in the middle of key shifts in...
